channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Trump links Abraham Accords to any Iran deal
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- As new Iran deal faces sharp criticism, Trump seeks to widen Abraham Accords
- Trump calls for 'mandatory' adherence to Abraham Accords in Iran ceasefire talks
- Trump calls for 'mandatory' adherence to Abraham Accords in Iran ceasefire talks
- Trump Wants More Muslim Nations To Join Abraham Accords — Even Iran
- Trump links Iran peace deal to wider Abraham Accords recognition
- 'Iran will NEVER have nukes!': Trump's warning to Tehran as he ties peace deal to Abraham Accords
- The Abraham Accord plus: Trump aims for grand bargain tying Islamic world with Israel
- Trump says Iran deal should include additional countries joining Abraham Accords
- Trump says Iran deal should include additional countries joining Abraham Accords
- Trump says U.S. will not 'rush into a deal' with Iran, as criticism mounts

- Trump pressured Iran to change its terms for a deal, but had little success.
- Trump Demands Widespread Sign-up To Abraham Accords As Part Of Iran Peace Deal

- US and Iran inch closer to peace deal as Trump faces criticism from GOP hawks | First Thing

- Trump blasts ‘weak and ineffective’ critics of potential Iran deal
